iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 22 Hour 06 - DETERRENT. IAEA finds hidden HEU in undamaged underground facility (pre-war). IC assessment: enrichment 'obliterated' in prior strikes. Netanyahu claims Iran 'cannot enrich' - no evidence. Pezeshkian: no nukes. IAEA chief: deal still possible. Updated 2026-03-21T06:00:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 22 Hour 06 - IMMINENT. Israel strikes Tehran regime targets fresh. Israel striking Beirut Hezbollah targets. Trump mixed: winding down / no ceasefire. Iran allows Japan ships through Hormuz (selective easing). Saudi intercepts 22 drones overnight. UK expands US base access, Iran warns British lives 'in danger'. Oil $107 (eased from $119). IAEA finds hidden HEU in undamaged facility. Updated 2026-03-21T06:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Trump says considering 'winding down' Iran war, other nations should police Hormuz
latest_news.text: Trump says he's considering 'winding down' the Iran war and leaving 'other nations' to deal with Strait of Hormuz. Waltz says war continuing. Contradictory signals persist.

latest_news.headline: Switzerland halts all US arms exports, closes airspace to US military flights
latest_news.text: Switzerland halts new arms export licenses to US, closes airspace to US military flights linked to Iran war. Cites neutrality law. First major European neutrality move.

latest_news.headline: Trump says US considering 'winding down' Iran war
latest_news.text: Trump posts US considering 'winding down' the war — contradicting earlier no-ceasefire stance. Major de-escalation signal.

latest_news.headline: US eases sanctions on Iranian oil at sea
latest_news.text: US Treasury authorizes purchase of ~140M barrels Iranian oil already at sea. Bessent: bringing 400M+ barrels to market since war start.

latest_news.headline: Khamenei Nowruz: 'Enemies of Islamic Republic being defeated'
latest_news.text: Khamenei written Nowruz message: enemies being defeated due to national unity. Pezeshkian reiterates no nuclear weapons pursuit.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: NEW: Israel strikes Sweida province Syria (Druze protection). Saudi + Turkey condemn. Potential new tracker trigger - monitoring.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 77% (up). Day 22 Hour 06 - IMMINENT. Fresh Israel strikes on Beirut: 7 neighborhoods evacuated, 20 killed 57 injured. 12 medical workers killed in health center strike. Hezbollah targets Israeli troops in 6 southern villages. 1000+ killed, 1M+ displaced. No ceasefire signals. Updated 2026-03-21T06:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Hezbollah destroys 6 Israeli Merkava tanks in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Hezbollah claims destruction of 6 Israeli Merkava tanks during attempted advance into Taybeh towards Deir Siryan area. Stiff ground resistance slowing Israeli advance.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes kill 10 in central Beirut, hospital ICU damaged
latest_news.text: At least 10 killed in central Beirut airstrike. Hospital ICU damaged in Nabatieh. Wide-scale shelling of southern Lebanon towns. 1M+ displaced.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 22 Hour 06 - DETERRENT. No new developments. 3 Patriot batteries at Incirlik. Updated 2026-03-21T06:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 22 Hour 06 - DETERRENT. No new developments. Updated 2026-03-21T06:00:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 13% (up). Day 22 Hour 06 - DETERRENT. Russia helping Iran reported ('Ghost in the Machine'). NATO relocates Iraq mission staff to Europe. No direct confrontation. Updated 2026-03-21T06:00:00Z

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 22 Hour 06 - DETERRENT. No PLA activity. Status quo. Updated 2026-03-21T06:00:00Z

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 22 Hour 06 - DETERRENT. No activity. Updated 2026-03-21T06:00:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 39% (up). Day 22 Hour 06 - CRITICAL. Third round peace talks derailed by Iran war. 201 combat clashes Mar 19. Zelensky sends team to US for weekend talks. Russia occupies ~20% Ukraine. Kremlin calls pause 'situational'. Updated 2026-03-21T06:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Kremlin confirms Ukraine peace talks on pause - 'situational' due to Iran war
latest_news.text: Kremlin says pause in Ukraine peace talks is 'situational' due to Iran conflict consuming US bandwidth. Kyiv says new meeting planned. Zelensky sends negotiating team to US for Saturday talks despite pause.

latest_news.headline: Gabbard tells Senate: Russia 'maintains upper hand' in Ukraine war
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard testifies Russia 'maintained the upper hand' in Ukraine war. Moscow likely to continue war of attrition until agreement reached. Putin says open to peace but actions contradict.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 43% (up). Day 22 Hour 06 - CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23. TTP also declared 3-day truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption feared. Updated 2026-03-21T06:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 06. DE-ESCALATION: Trump 'winding down' rhetoric (no ceasefire), US eases oil sanctions, Iran selectively opens Hormuz for Japan, oil at $107 (down from $119). ESCALATION: Fresh Tehran + Beirut strikes, 20 killed Lebanon, medical workers killed, UK base access expanded, Iran warns British lives, 20+ Saudi drones intercepted overnight, ground invasion rhetoric continues, Hormuz still effectively closed. NET: Military operations intensifying despite diplomatic off-ramp signals.

latest_news.headline: Iran fires 2 IRBMs at Diego Garcia - first known 4000km strike
latest_news.text: Iran fires 2 intermediate-range ballistic missiles at Diego Garcia US-UK base in Indian Ocean. One failed in flight, one intercepted by SM-3. First known Iranian strike at 4000km range. Demonstrates unprecedented capability.

latest_news.headline: IRGC True Promise 4: strikes on 55+ US/Israeli sites across region
latest_news.text: IRGC announces Operation True Promise 4 - coordinated strikes on 55+ US and Israeli-linked sites across 5 Gulf nations. Largest single Iranian offensive of the war.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu: ground component needed - cannot win from air alone
latest_news.text: Netanyahu signals ground phase: You cannot do revolutions from the air. There has to be a ground component. Major escalation signal.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Syria (Sweida) - Saudi Arabia & Turkey condemn
latest_news.text: IDF strikes Syrian army camps in Sweida citing Druze protection. Saudi: blatant aggression. Turkey: dangerous escalation. New front opens.

latest_news.headline: Trump calls NATO COWARDS over Hormuz refusal
latest_news.text: Trump: NATO allies are COWARDS, and we will REMEMBER! Invoked Pearl Harbor in meeting with Japanese PM Takaichi.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 21, 05:04 UTC) — Trump says 'winding down' war but no ceasefire. Switzerland halts US arms exports (neutrality). Hormuz closed Day 21. Diego Garcia IRBM strike unprecedented. True Promise 4 (55+ sites). Netanyahu ground component. Syria front opened. Pakistan ceasefire holding through Mar 23. Post-Eid PAK-AFG fighting feared. Updated 2026-03-21T05:04:00Z

predictions.description: Strait of Hormuz expected to remain under Iranian blockade. Additional shipping attacks probable within 12 hours.
Israeli ground operation in southern Lebanon expected to continue beyond Litani River. Further displacement and infrastructure destruction likely.
Status quo maintained. No PLA activity changes detected. Taiwan Strait remains stable.
PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN remains stable at current levels. No significant changes anticipated.
